description: The overall experience is amazing I truly loved the app, copilot and extension like I said before having it all in one place makes it amazing and removing the need to use other tools because you have everything that you need here and surely, I will introduce Iteration X to my team.
author: Belal S.
pros: The AI Copilot and Iteration X extension were the most 2 unique features that really impressed me like all the other software I worked with this was the first time for me to encounter these unique and helpful tools.
cons: To be honest I did not find any down sides until now but surely if I find any, I will write about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: You have to try it and get the best experience out of Iteration X
description: Iteration X helps me a lot in projects related to gathering research, documentation, assigned tasks and also managing large project development that needs many small tasks to complete. The information in each issue can be completed by anyone related to the project. The issue also can be transferred to another app when collaborating with different teams so working with different apps is still possible. I think it has a neat user interface and an easier approach to project management.
author: Indriani S.
pros: The Adds-on plugin and the ITX AI. It helps my team members to gather the information we need as fast as possible, screencap and take videos without going to different apps, and assign it to the member without much hassle. I also like how it is easy to integrate new team members and have them ask the itx about what the app can do. It also can be integrated to many available project management task so you can combine with Jira and Asana. I also like that when you upload task, it displayed as one list rather than when you need to find the attachment in comment below.
cons: Sometimes my member will talk a lot in the chat so it is better to have a summary discussion in the ticket description itself than the comment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good but need more rework on it
description: Its good but need to make more usable for the users to improve the product
author: Rohan K.
pros: Easy to mark the issues and good as an overall product.
cons: The information flow of it. There are things which they can improve.

review_title: It transformed the way we collaborate between Product and Engineering
description: I was struggling to find an easy to use project management tool (I tested click, shortcut, jira) and was never satisfied (too complicated, not easy for product people and engineers to collaborate) when I stumbled across Iteration X. Now we use it for both our sprints and issue management. As the main product manager of the team it's easy for me to record the issue and make it easy to the developers to replicate and fix.
author: Amel M.
pros: I love : - the easiness of setup - the plugin to record an issue - the simplicity of use - the embedded AI
cons: - not having the network logs (I read it's coming soon)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Iteration X save us so much time and effort !
description: The overall experience is very good. I jumped into the tool and created my first issue in minutes with the chrome plugin! After that I invited the whole team and we started using it every week!
author: Leonardo C.
pros: The user experience impressive, capturing issues becomes effortless !! :)
cons: Maybe the some integrations with Azure tools, but it was not a deal breaker at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SIMPLE AND EASY TO USE APP PACKED WITH ESSENTIAL FEATURES FOR EFFICIENCY
description: Great project management tool, extension and AI assistance for quick issue capture, recording and sharing with teammates. Simple and easy to use and increases efficiency when working with multiple projects. Highly recommend.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Iteration X has a simplicity and ease of use that appeals to busy digital coordinators who prefer far less clutter than other more popular project management applications. With the ability to capture issues through the app as well as the chrome extension, Iteration X has made problem solving quick and easy. Issues can be easily assigned to team members with the help of the AI feature!
cons: I think there are still some minor improvements that are needed such as being able to upload word/excel/pdf documents as well as images to the app; however, the features will hopefully be available soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall as a product is good to use and it really helped
author: rohan Y.
pros: Helped in getting issues with live product at one place.
cons: Not great for issues reporting in different team.

author: Rohan Y.
pros: The issue tracking is smooth and easy to managed
cons: The UI is not straightforward, sometimes the user gets lost.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall it was a good experience. It helped the team.
author: Hrishabh P.
pros: Helps streamline the issues and allocation of the bugs. Really helpful for the team
cons: All the issues are stacked at a single place which makes it tidious.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best Test collaboration tool on the Market
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product offers seamless collaboration between client, testers and devs unparalleled in the market
cons: The product is only availabile on web and not on phone apps
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rohan Y.
pros: The issue reporting is very good and collaboration feature is very good
cons: The collaboration feature requires more improvement

description: One of the best discovery of 2023 ! IterationX has helped us so much since we added it to our product stack. The overall experience is great. It is now a must have on our side!
author: Mehdi S.
pros: Without any hesitation, the seamless collaboration between our clients and our project team in the ticketing process.
cons: So far, as the product evolves quickly, I did not find any downside in the latest versions of IterationX

review_title: Early users of Iteration X - It evolves
author: Ihab S.
pros: The quick response, support and the continuous development and addition of features
cons: Sometimes it glitches. The representation of severity of issues could be better. More personas like issue closed by someone but not the second

review_title: Excellent App for Task Management and Documentation
author: Lautaro W.
pros: AI helps so much with documentation and it has an intuitive user interface
cons: There should be more quality control in some complex new functionalities
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Fast, easy, helpful to track and dispatch tasks
author: Jean Michel A.
pros: Very easy tool to use, very good integration to target specific bugs in a page location (screen capture, screencast, or upload). Very helpful to gain time.
cons: Quite disturbing not to know if you did validate your request, text.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
